        Project Manager

        University of Portsmouth Estates Department
        Pembroke Park, Portsmouth (PO1), PO1 2UP
        £20,532 - £22,238 (41,064 - 44,746 x 0.5 FTE) per annum
        The Project Manager will manage a number of smaller-scale technical projects concurrently, working with stakeholders from the business and IT to produce accurate and achievable delivery plans to enable projects to be successfully delivered. The Project Manager will initiate projects, identifying and securing the required resources, prioritising and overseeing the project activities, preparing and tracking a project delivery plan, and escalating to stakeholders when required to enable projects to be successfully implemented. This role will manage small-scale digital transformation and IT projects, managing the full project lifecycle, from initiation to handover to business as usual. If you wish to apply as a secondee, you must have approval of your line manager in advance of submitting your application form. Please confirm in your application that your line manager has approved this.

        What is the average salary for Project Manager in UK?

        Average salary per year
        £54,657
        The average salary for a Project Manager in UK is £54,657. Project Manager in UK salaries range from £42,499 to £70,310.

        Frequently Asked Questions

        How many Project Manager jobs are there in UK?
        There are 1,181 Project Manager jobs within 20 miles of UK available on CWJobs right now.
        Where in UK are these jobs?
        You can find jobs in South East, Midlands, North West.
        What other similar jobs are there to Project Manager jobs in UK?
        As well as Project Manager jobs in UK, you can find IT, Management, Project Management, amongst many others.
        Which industry do Project Manager jobs in UK belong to?
        Project Manager jobs in UK are part of the Management industry.
